mapper.select: select g.id, g.owner_id, g.conversation_id, g.name, g.avatar_media_id, g.intro, g.notice, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, g.deleted_at, u.nickname as owner_nickname, (select count(1) from cook_conversation_members cm where cm.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and cm.status = 'normal') as member_count, (select count(1) from cook_messages m where m.conversation_id = g.conversation_id and m.deleted_at is null) as message_count from `cook_groups` g inner join cook_users u on u.id = g.owner_id and u.deleted_at is null where g.id = #{id} and g.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into `cook_groups` (owner_id, name, avatar_media_id, intro, notice, status) values (#{ownerId}, #{name}, #{avatarMediaId}, #{intro}, #{notice}, #{status})
mapper.update: update `cook_groups` set conversation_id = #{conversationId}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
